ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., sword, shield, armor) */,
  "item_level" INTEGER /* Level of the item */,
  "item_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item set to which the item belongs */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic, legendary) */,
  "item_price" INTEGER /* Price of the item in the game's currency */,
  "item_effect" TEXT /* Special effects or bonuses the item provides */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_set_id") REFERENCES item_sets ("item_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_slots" (
  "item_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item slot */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the slot (e.g., head, chest, hands) */,
  "min_item_level" INTEGER /* Minimum item level required to equip the item in this slot */,
  "slot_type" TEXT /* Type of slot (e.g., head, chest, hands) */,
  "slot_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of items that can be equipped in this slot */,
  "slot_effect" TEXT /* Special effects or bonuses the slot provides when an item is equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_slots_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sets" (
  "item_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item set */,
  "item_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the item set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item set */,
  "set_effect" TEXT /* Special effects or bonuses provided when all items in the set are equipped */,
  "set_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item set (e.g., common, rare, epic, legendary) */,
  "set_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "character_level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "character_experience" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the character */,
  "character_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipments" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipped item */,
  "item_slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the slot where the item is equipped */,
  "item_level" INTEGER /* Level of the equipped item */,
  "equipped_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipments_item_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_slot_id") REFERENCES item_slots ("item_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipments_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
